concerns.text: FR-007 (logging), FR-008 (hardware constraints), FR-010 (manifest) lack explicit story anchors. While they support US-1's pipeline, no traceability reference (e.g., 'See US-1') is present. Add anchoring to clarify coverage.
SC-004 (wall-clock time ≤ 6 hours) has no explicit story anchor. It relates to US-1's pipeline execution but lacks traceability. Add reference to US-1 or clarify scope coverage.
FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-009 serve US-1 but lack explicit anchors. FR-005 serves US-2, FR-006 serves US-3. Add inline references (e.g., 'Anchored to US-1') to all FRs for traceability.
SC-001, SC-006 serve US-1; SC-002, SC-003 serve US-2; SC-005 serves US-3. None have explicit anchors. Add traceability references to ensure requirements coverage is verifiable.
Success criterion labeled 'SC-03' instead of 'SC-003' — inconsistent numbering with other SCs (SC-001, SC-002, SC-004, etc.).
Clarification text repeats 'FR-003' twice: '**FR-003**: **FR-003**: System MUST construct...' — formatting error in requirement clarification.
Clarification text repeats 'FR-001' twice: '**FR-001**: **FR-001**: System MUST ingest...' — formatting error in requirement clarification.
Clarification text repeats 'FR-004' twice: '**FR-004**: **FR-004**: System MUST fit...' — formatting error in requirement clarification.

FeatureSet entity lists 'sentiment_score' as a column, but no FR requires computing sentiment scores. This creates an inconsistency between the entity definition and requirements. Either add an FR for sentiment computation or remove from FeatureSet.

SC-003 specifies WAIC improvement ≥5% relative to baseline. The idea did not specify this threshold. This is a specific empirical value that should be deferred to implementation phase per spec template guidance.

Coverage target of 0.85-0.90 is specified in acceptance scenarios and SC-002. The idea did not specify this threshold. This should use [deferred] marker per spec template guidance for planning artifacts.

FR-003 clarification states: 'When per-user historical sharing counts are unavailable... compute a proxy susceptibility score from cascade topology metrics (node degree ≥ 2, total shares within dataset ≥ 1).' If 'total shares within dataset' refers to shares in the cascade being predicted, this creates circularity: predictors are derived from the outcome variable itself. The spec must distinguish between pre-cascade historical data (independent) and cascade-internal metrics (dependent on outcome).

SC-001 requires 'at least three predictors achieve posterior probability > 0.95 of having non-zero effect.' This is a success criterion that could be met by overfitting or by construction if predictors are correlated with cascade size by definition. The criterion should be tied to held-out predictive performance (as in SC-002) rather than posterior significance alone.

SC-002 specifies coverage 'between 0.85 and 0.90' as a success criterion. This is an arbitrary threshold without empirical justification. The spec should state that coverage is measured against the nominal interval level (e.g., 90% intervals should have ~90% coverage) rather than asserting a fixed target range.

responses.response: Added explicit story anchors (See US-1) to FR-007, FR-008, FR-010 to clarify traceability.
responses.what_changed: FR-007, FR-008, FR-010 now include '(See US-1)' anchor

responses.response: Added explicit story anchor (See US-1) to SC-004 to clarify traceability.
Added explicit story anchors to FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-009 (See US-1); FR-005 (See US-2); FR-006 (See US-3).
responses.what_changed: All FRs now include appropriate (See US-N) anchors

responses.response: Added explicit story anchors to SC-001, SC-006 (See US-1); SC-002, SC-003 (See US-2); SC-005 (See US-3).
responses.what_changed: All SCs now include appropriate (See US-N) anchors

responses.response: Renamed SC-03 to SC-003 for consistent numbering.
Fixed duplicate FR-003 label in clarification text.
Fixed duplicate FR-001 label in clarification text.
Fixed duplicate FR-004 label in clarification text.
Removed 'sentiment_score' from FeatureSet entity definition and removed corresponding sentiment-related assumption to maintain consistency.
responses.what_changed: FeatureSet entity no longer lists sentiment_score; Assumptions section sentiment assumption removed

responses.response: Changed SC-003 WAIC improvement threshold from ≥5% to [deferred] per spec template guidance for planning artifacts.
Changed SC-002 and US-2 coverage target from 0.85-0.90 to [deferred] per spec template guidance; added note that coverage measured against nominal interval level.
responses.what_changed: Coverage targets now use [deferred] with measurement reference to nominal interval level

responses.response: Rewrote FR-003 clarification to explicitly distinguish pre-cascade historical data (independent predictors) from cascade-internal metrics (dependent on outcome). Proxy score uses only pre-cascade activity metrics available before cascade starts.
responses.what_changed: FR-003 clarification now specifies proxy uses 'pre-cascade historical activity' not cascade-internal metrics

responses.response: Updated SC-001 to require that predictors with posterior probability >0.95 must also show consistent effect direction on held-out validation data (not just posterior significance alone).
responses.what_changed: SC-001 now ties posterior probability requirement to held-out validation consistency

responses.response: Updated SC-002 to state coverage is measured against nominal interval level (e.g., 90% intervals should have ~90% coverage) rather than asserting fixed target range.
responses.what_changed: SC-002 now references measurement against nominal interval level instead of fixed 0.85-0.90 range

new_concerns.text: SC-004 states 'does not exceed a reasonable timeframe' — 'reasonable timeframe' is not measurable. Success criteria must state a quantitative threshold (e.g., '≤ 6 hours') or a reproducible procedure to determine pass/fail.
